title: Youtube Poop: Dissidia is full of Guay Special Ops Members, Gays, and Pirates
description:
Squall is annoyed by Bartz's gaiety while Gabranth flaunts his dance moves, while Tidus goes on a sea adventure with his two friends Ichigo and Sasuke.

I think I got a good amount of jokes in this one.

It's not a YTP "short", because it's over a minute.
